rulings.Case Title: DIANE TALLEY-EVANS et al VS. HAIGHT STREET MORTGAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; Points And Authorities, And Declarations - Insistence
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 5, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFS DIANE TALLEY-EVANS and GARY EVANS' Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; Points And Authorities, And Declarations - Insistence is DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). There is no specific evidence regarding lack of notice of March 25, 2015 hearing or August 15, 2014 order. Proofs of service indicate that plaintiffs were served at their address on the record. Plaintiffs fail to attach a proposed opposition to the motion to dismiss. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS GOMEZ VS. NANCY RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 5, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANTS NANCY RAMIREZ and YENER GODINEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Request for Judicial notice is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall have a 5 day leave to amend the complaint o clarify the terms of the tenancy, specifically whether defendants lease covers the whole property (concurrently with defendants in cases 652196 and 652197) or there is a specific room designation. = (501/REQ)
